title: Dimension Cakes
description: Dimension Cakes allows you to transport to different dimensions.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/GFG8N7N.png)

Dimension Cakes allows you to transport to different dimensions. Each cake has 6 uses and can be recharged with a configurable item.

 

Current Dimensions include:

- Overworld
- Nether
- End
 

More dimensions will be included in the near future.

 

Pack Makers: Feel free to include Dimension Cakes in your modpack.
